definition: The fiscal doom loop (rising deficits, higher yields, larger interest burden, wider deficits) is a 15-25% tail risk over 5 years, not a central scenario. Conjunction probability critique shows even at 60% per link, six independent links yield ~5% probability; correlated failures raise it to 15-30%. Reserve currency exceptionalism reduces crisis probability from IMF base rate (35-40%) to 8-12%.
evidence: Conjunction probability: six links at 60% each yield ~5% if independent
Correlated failures raise joint probability to 15-30%
macro_strategist_01 independently arrives at 8-12% for disorderly adjustment
IMF cross-country base rate 35-40% reduced by reserve currency status
Pair_3 endorsed probability discipline but refuted independence assumption
US 2009-2024 unprecedented deficits without sovereign stress
open_questions: Is the 2009-2024 period evidence of stabilizer effectiveness or evidence of luck?
What is the formal event tree with conditional branching probabilities?
Is reserve currency status a permanent level shift or a delay mechanism?
